announcement.title: 0.4.18 is now available!
announcement.message: Scarlet 0.4.18 ships desktop notifications with per-category toggles (Windows native tray, Linux notify-send, macOS osascript) and one-file PIN-encrypted migration bundles for moving your entire identity between machines. The main window gains right-click column hiding and a View menu to hide the CLI tab. Linux users get live package-install progress with an embedded terminal, guided TTS voice/audio-player install, and TTS now plays through the system sound server so it follows your selected device. You can now self-service unlink your VRChat account, and suspicious-pronoun detection has a master toggle. Dozens of fixes landed: Linux installs actually run, auto-invite 403s are handled correctly, Linux TTS plays on the right output, popups match the dark theme, and the migration path is hardened against zip bombs and XXE attacks.
